artifacts.name: InstancedBricks Review
artifacts.description: Line-level comments and summary review posted on PR #40; verdict: APPROVED with minor suggestions

summary.work_completed: Reviewed PR #40 (InstancedBricks.tsx) for FR-PERF-001 compliance. Implementation is correct, well-documented, and meets performance targets. Minor suggestions: remove redundant zero-scale loop and clarify comment about optimization.
key_findings: InstancedMesh usage correct: one mesh per brick type, per-instance color via setColorAt
Matrix updates cover position and rotation
Code quality: TypeScript strict compliant, proper React hooks, no anti-patterns
Test alignment: unit and performance tests match implementation

human_review_required.reason: Frontend review completed with APPROVED verdict; human to merge if suggestions are acceptable (they are non-blocking)

recommended_actions: Merge PR #40 if the minor suggestions are acceptable (they are non-blocking)
Consider removing the zero-scale loop in a follow-up PR for minor performance gain
Update the comment on line 91 for clarity
